content_markdown:
# Unshakeable Ground
## Scripture
"He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches. To the one who conquers I will grant to eat of the tree of life, which is in the paradise of God." – Revelation 2:7

## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we face many challenges and temptations in this world. But Jesus reminds us that our foundation must be solid, like the unshakeable mountains that endure despite the turmoil around them. We cannot rely on our own strength or the shifting sands of worldly opinions. Instead, we must stand firm on the rock of God's Word, trusting in His promises and His sovereignty. Just as the church in Revelation 2:7 is called to listen to the Spirit's voice, we too must be attentive to God's guidance and direction.

Let us commit to reading and studying God's Word daily, seeking wisdom and understanding. Let us pray for the Spirit's guidance, that we may be unshakeable in our faith and unmovable in our pursuit of Christ.

## Daily Challenge
"Run 5 miles today, remembering that God's strength is made perfect in our weakness."
